ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the stock prices */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Industry sector the stock belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Specific industry the stock operates in */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date of the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is primarily traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the report is about */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert is for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, price decrease) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Price threshold for triggering the alert */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, dismissed) */,
  "triggered_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "notification_preference" TEXT /* User's preferred method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the news is about */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news article */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the online version of the news article */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score indicating the overall tone of the article (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correlations" (
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correlation */,
  "stock_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first stock in the correlation */,
  "stock_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second stock in the correlation */,
  "correlation_coefficient" REAL /* Correlation coefficient between the two stocks */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date the correlation was calculated */,
  "time_frame" TEXT /* Time frame over which the correlation was calculated (e.g., 1 day, 1 week, 1 month) */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the correlation (e.g., Pearson, Spearman) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correlations_stock_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id_1") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correlations_stock_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id_2") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the forecast is for */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date the forecast was made */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price for the stock */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Model used for making the forecast */,
  "time_frame" TEXT /* Time frame for the forecast (e.g., 1 day, 1 week, 1 month) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the forecast based on historical data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event occurred */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event, if applicable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the historical event */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the event on stock prices */,
  "affected_stocks" TEXT /* List of stock IDs affected by the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_events_affected_stocks FOREIGN KEY ("affected_stocks") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
